message:
fix(outcome): Make feedback recording idempotent across replays

- Use recordedAt timestamp from outcome instead of now() for stable
  idempotency when replaying the outcome log
- Add deduplication check before recording feedback events (same type,
  sessionPath, and timestamp)
- Accept 'partial' status in outcome command (was in type but rejected)
- Use persisted record for applyOutcomeFeedback when available
- Add test verifying idempotency when re-applying same outcome record

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
